title: Breaking API removals committed as fix: with no semver signal
description: with_max_entries, DEFAULT_MAX_CACHE_ENTRIES, and cache_key parameter were all removed from public API and committed as fix: — gives no signal to dependents that a breaking change occurred, and no changelog entry. Users upgrading in a workspace will get a silent build break with no release-notes warning. **Why:** conventional commits fix: does not mean breaking — fix!: or BREAKING CHANGE footer is required. **How to apply:** use fix!: or feat!: for any commit that removes or incompatibly changes public items, even on 0.x crates.
